enumDescriptions: Store cache in VSCode global storage, shared across all workspaces (recommended)
Store cache at the path given by scryer.cacheDir
scryer.cacheLocation.description: Where Scryer stores its unified cache (source assets + derived conversions)

scryer.cacheDir.description: Cache root when scryer.cacheLocation is "custom". Ignored otherwise. Contains source/ and derived/ subdirectories.

scryer.installDir.description: Path to your World of Warcraft root directory — the folder containing _retail_/, _classic_/, and .build.info (e.g. /path/to/World of Warcraft). Used for build-version detection (automatic cache invalidation on game updates) and as a loose-file texture fallback for Classic. The active flavor's subdirectory is derived automatically from scryer.flavor.

scryer.cascToolPath.description: Path to the CASC extraction tool binary (e.g. rustydemon-cli). Passed to the extraction script via --casc-tool. If empty, the tool is auto-detected from PATH.

scryer.blp2pngPath.description: Optional path to a blp2png CLI binary used as fallback for unsupported BLP variants.

scryer.defaultTarget.description: Default WoW version target when no workspace target is configured

scryer.flavor.description: WoW flavor for on-demand texture extraction (retail | classic | classic_era)

enumDescriptions: Debug and above: verbose diagnostics, corpus stats, template chains
Warnings and above: unknown templates, missing assets, resolution failures (default)
scryer.logLevel.description: Controls how much diagnostic output Scryer writes to the Output channel

enumDescriptions: All templates + full Blizzard texture tree; ~452 MB, ~40s
scryer.startupContent.description: What Blizzard template and asset content Scryer loads when the extension activates

enumDescriptions: Resolve and decode textures only when the webview requests them
Pre-warm textures in the currently saved file; tiny <2ms each, large <4s each
Same as saved-file but reads unsaved buffer contents; updates live as you type
Pre-warm textures for all WoW XML files in the workspace; tiny <2ms each, large <4s each
scryer.userAddonPreload.description: How eagerly Scryer pre-warms texture assets for the addon currently being previewed

scryer.flavorConfigPath.description: Path to a JSON file that overrides per-flavor display defaults (fonts, viewport size, scale). Must match the shape of src/flavors/defaults.json. Merged additively on top of the built-in config — later layers win per key.

scryer.showRuler.description: Show a pixel ruler overlay along the top and left edges of the Scryer preview panel. Coordinates are in WoW logical pixels. Toggle with Scryer: Toggle Pixel Ruler or the status bar button.

scripts.clear-cache:global: node -e "const os=require('os'),path=require('path'),fs=require('fs');const id='vertex-wow.wow-scryer';const dirs=[path.join(os.homedir(),'.vscode-server','data','User','globalStorage',id),path.join(os.homedir(),'.config','Code','User','globalStorage',id),path.join(os.homedir(),'Library','Application Support','Code','User','globalStorage',id)];const found=dirs.filter(d=>fs.existsSync(d));found.length?found.forEach(d=>{fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('Cleared: '+d);}):console.log('Global cache not found (already clean or non-standard path).')"
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck
